title: Lead SEO Specialist at Axe India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Axe India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axe India International Enterprises! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axe India International Enterprises:
Axe India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India International Enterprises!
